query.value:
<fetch version="1.0" output-format="xml-platform" mapping="logical" distinct="false">
  <entity name="account">
    <attribute name="accountid" />
    <attribute name="xrm_amname" />
    <attribute name="ava_m3number" />
    <attribute name="accountnumber" />
    <attribute name="ava_m3status" />
    <attribute name="address2_city" />
    <attribute name="address2_country" />
    <attribute name="address2_stateorprovince" />
    <attribute name="address2_line1" />
    <attribute name="address2_postalcode" />
    <attribute name="ava_checkifmandatorypo" />
    <attribute name="name" />
    <attribute name="telephone1" />
    <attribute name="fax" />
    <attribute name="xrm_language" />
    <attribute name="ava_kosher" />
    <attribute name="ava_storenumber" />
    <attribute name="ava_first3digitsofpostalcode" />
    <attribute name="msdyn_taxexempt" />
    <attribute name="ava_tpsgsthst" />
    <attribute name="ava_tvppst" />
    <attribute name="ava_warehouse" />
    <attribute name="xrm_accounttype" />
    <attribute name="ava_divcomparamark" />
    <order attribute="ava_m3number" descending="false" />
    <filter type="and">
      <condition attribute="ava_customerstage" operator="eq" value="40" />
      <condition attribute="ava_m3number" operator="eq" value="@{pipeline().parameters.M3AccountNumber}" />
    </filter>
    <link-entity name="account" from="accountid" to="xrm_billto" visible="false" link-type="outer" alias="BillTo">
      <attribute name="ava_m3number" alias="BillTo_m3number"/>
    </link-entity>
    <link-entity name="territory" from="territoryid" to="xrm_district" visible="false" link-type="outer" alias="Territory">
      <attribute name="ava_m3code" alias="Territory_m3code"/>
      <attribute name="xrm_code" alias="Territory_code"/>
      <link-entity name="systemuser" from="systemuserid" to="ava_profilemanager" link-type="outer" alias="SystemUser">
        <attribute name="smg_inforid" alias="SystemUser_ProfileManagerid"/>
      </link-entity>
    </link-entity>
    <link-entity name="xrm_primarymarketsegment" from="xrm_primarymarketsegmentid" to="xrm_primarymarket" visible="false" link-type="outer" alias="PrimaryMarket">
      <attribute name="xrm_code" alias="PrimaryMarket_m3code"/>
    </link-entity>
    <link-entity name="xrm_secondarymarketsegment" from="xrm_secondarymarketsegmentid" to="xrm_secondarymarket" visible="false" link-type="outer" alias="SecondaryMarket">
      <attribute name="xrm_code" alias="SecondaryMarket_m3code"/>
    </link-entity>
    <link-entity name="xrm_buyinggroup" from="xrm_buyinggroupid" to="xrm_buyinggroup" visible="false" link-type="outer" alias="BuyingGroup">
      <attribute name="xrm_code" alias="BuyingGroup_m3code"/>
    </link-entity>
    <link-entity name="ava_additionalpurchasinggroup" from="ava_additionalpurchasinggroupid" to="ava_additionalpurchasinggroup" visible="false" link-type="outer" alias="AdditionalPurchasingGroup">
      <attribute name="ava_code" alias="AdditionalPurchasingGroup_m3code"/>
    </link-entity>
    <link-entity name="xrm_nationalgroup" from="xrm_nationalgroupid" to="xrm_national_group" visible="false" link-type="outer" alias="NationalGroup">
      <attribute name="xrm_code" alias="NationalGroup_m3code"/>
    </link-entity>
    <link-entity name="businessunit" from="businessunitid" to="xrm_division" visible="false" link-type="outer" alias="BusinessUnit">
      <attribute name="xrm_code" alias="BusinessUnit_m3code"/>
      <attribute name="ava_companym3" alias="BusinessUnit_companym3"/>
    </link-entity>
  </entity>
</fetch>

source.query:
<fetch version="1.0" output-format="xml-platform" mapping="logical" distinct="false">
  <entity name="ava_parameter">
    <attribute name="ava_value" />
    <order attribute="ava_name" descending="false" />
    <filter type="and">
      <condition attribute="ava_name" operator="eq" value="InforAPIBaseURL" />
      <condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="0" />
    </filter>
  </entity>
</fetch>

expression.value: @and(and(contains(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0],'AdditionalPurchasingGroup_m3code'),not(equals(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].AdditionalPurchasingGroup_m3code,null))),not(equals(replace(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].AdditionalPurchasingGroup_m3code,' ',''),'')))

url.value:
@concat(variables('varInforAPIBaseURL'),
        'M3/m3api-rest/v2/execute/CRS610MI/ChgFinancial?',
        'CONO=',activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].BusinessUnit_companym3,
        '&CUNO=',variables('varCustomerNumber'),
        if(and(and(contains(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0],'ava_tpsgsthst'),not(equals(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].ava_tpsgsthst,null))),not(equals(replace(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].ava_tpsgsthst,' ',''),''))),concat('&CORG=',activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].ava_tpsgsthst),''),
        if(and(and(contains(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0],'ava_tvppst'),not(equals(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].ava_tvppst,null))),not(equals(replace(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].ava_tvppst,' ',''),''))),concat('&COR2=',activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].ava_tvppst),''),
        if(and(contains(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0],'msdyn_taxexempt'),not(equals(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].msdyn_taxexempt,null))),if(equals(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].msdyn_taxexempt, true),'&VTCD=90',''),''),
        '&maxrecs=0')

expression.value: @and(and(contains(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0],'ava_first3digitsofpostalcode'),not(equals(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].ava_first3digitsofpostalcode,null))),not(equals(replace(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].ava_first3digitsofpostalcode,' ',''),'')))

message.value:
@concat('Account ', pipeline().parameters.M3AccountNumber,
         ' has not been created in Infor. ErrorType: ',
         activity('Call CRS610MI_Copy').output.results[0].errorType,
         ', ErrorMessage: ',
         activity('Call CRS610MI_Copy').output.results[0].errorMessage,
         '.')

url.value:
@concat(variables('varInforAPIBaseURL'),
        'M3/m3api-rest/v2/execute/CRS610MI/Copy?',
        'CONO=',activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].BusinessUnit_companym3,
        '&LNCD=',if(and(contains(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0],'xrm_language'),not(equals(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].xrm_language,null))),if(equals(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].xrm_language, 163650001),'FR','GB'),'GB'),
        '&CUTM=',if(equals(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].xrm_accounttype,163650002),'ZTEMPL001',if(equals(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].xrm_accounttype,163650001),'ZTEMPP001','ZTEMPL002')),
        '&CUNO=',activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].ava_m3number,
        '&CUNM=',replace(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].name,'#',''),
        '&CUA1=',activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].address2_line1,
        if(and(and(contains(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0],'address2_postalcode'),not(equals(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].address2_postalcode,null))),not(equals(replace(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].address2_postalcode,' ',''),''))),toUpper(concat('&PONO=',substring(replace(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].address2_postalcode,' ',''),0,3),' ',substring(replace(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].address2_postalcode,' ',''),3,3))),''),
        if(and(and(contains(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0],'telephone1'),not(equals(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].telephone1,null))),not(equals(replace(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].telephone1,' ',''),''))),concat('&PHNO=',substring(replace(replace(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].telephone1,' ',''),'-',''),0,3),'-',substring(replace(replace(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].telephone1,' ',''),'-',''),3,3),'-',substring(replace(replace(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].telephone1,' ',''),'-',''),6,4)),''),
        if(and(and(contains(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0],'ava_divcomparamark'),not(equals(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].ava_divcomparamark,null))),not(equals(replace(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].ava_divcomparamark,' ',''),''))),concat('&PHN2=',activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].ava_divcomparamark),''),
        if(and(and(contains(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0],'fax'),not(equals(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].fax,null))),not(equals(replace(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].fax,' ',''),''))),concat('&TFNO=',substring(replace(replace(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].fax,' ',''),'-',''),0,3),'-',substring(replace(replace(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].fax,' ',''),'-',''),3,3),'-',substring(replace(replace(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].fax,' ',''),'-',''),6,4)),''),
        if(and(and(contains(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0],'accountnumber'),not(equals(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].accountnumber,null))),not(equals(replace(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].accountnumber,' ',''),''))),concat('&ALCU=',activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].accountnumber),''),
        if(and(and(contains(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0],'ava_storenumber'),not(equals(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].ava_storenumber,null))),not(equals(replace(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].ava_storenumber,' ',''),''))),concat('&YRE2=',activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].ava_storenumber),''),
        if(equals(activity('Get 2 Chars StateProvince').output.nrOfSuccessfullTransactions,0),'',concat('&ECAR=',activity('Get 2 Chars StateProvince').output.results[0].records[0].REPL)),
        if(equals(activity('Get 2 Chars Country').output.nrOfSuccessfullTransactions,0),'',concat('&CSCD=',activity('Get 2 Chars Country').output.results[0].records[0].REPL)),
        if(and(and(contains(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0],'NationalGroup_m3code'),not(equals(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].NationalGroup_m3code,null))),not(equals(replace(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].NationalGroup_m3code,' ',''),''))),concat('&CFC1=',activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].NationalGroup_m3code),''),
        if(and(and(contains(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0],'BusinessUnit_m3code'),not(equals(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].BusinessUnit_m3code,null))),not(equals(replace(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].BusinessUnit_m3code,' ',''),''))),concat('&CFC4=',activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].BusinessUnit_m3code),''),
        '&CFC7=',convertFromUtc(utcNow(),'Eastern Standard Time','yyyyMMdd'),
        if(and(and(contains(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0],'PrimaryMarket_m3code'),not(equals(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].PrimaryMarket_m3code,null))),not(equals(replace(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].PrimaryMarket_m3code,' ',''),''))),concat('&CFC8=',activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].PrimaryMarket_m3code),''),
        '&CFC0=',if(and(contains(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0],'ava_kosher'),not(equals(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].ava_kosher,null))),if(equals(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].ava_kosher, true),'Y','N'),'N'),
        if(and(and(contains(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0],'SecondaryMarket_m3code'),not(equals(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].SecondaryMarket_m3code,null))),not(equals(replace(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].SecondaryMarket_m3code,' ',''),''))),concat('&CFC9=',activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].SecondaryMarket_m3code),''),
        '&STAT=10',
        if(and(and(contains(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0],'address2_city'),not(equals(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].address2_city,null))),not(equals(replace(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].address2_city,' ',''),''))),concat('&TOWN=',if(greater(length(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].address2_city),20),substring(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].address2_city,0,20),activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].address2_city)),''),
        '&maxrecs=0')

@concat(variables('varInforAPIBaseURL'),
        'M3/m3api-rest/v2/execute/EXPORTMI/SelectPad?SEPC=|&HDRS=0&QERY=CKECAR from CSYSTS where CKCONO = ''',
         activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].BusinessUnit_companym3,
         ''' and CKCSCD = ''',
         if(equals(activity('Get 2 Chars Country').output.nrOfSuccessfullTransactions,0),'',activity('Get 2 Chars Country').output.results[0].records[0].REPL),
         ''' and ',
         if(equals(length(trim(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].address2_stateorprovince)),2),concat('CKECAR = ''',toUpper(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].address2_stateorprovince)),concat('CKTX40 = ''',replace(activity('Get Acounts to create').output.value[0].address2_stateorprovince,'é','e'))),
         '''&maxrecs=0')

query.value:
@concat('CALL management.SP_RunningTaskErrorSynapse(''',
        pipeline().parameters.RunningTask_TaskName,
        ''',',
        if(empty(pipeline().parameters.RunningTask_LogID),0,pipeline().parameters.RunningTask_LogID),
        ',',
        '0,',
        '''Missing Data: Account ', pipeline().parameters.M3AccountNumber,
        ' has not been sent for creation to Infor for the following reason(s): ',
         variables('varError'), '. Pipeline Run ID: ', pipeline().RunId,
        ''')')

@concat('CALL management.SP_RunningTaskErrorSynapse(''',
        pipeline().parameters.RunningTask_TaskName,
        ''',',
        if(empty(pipeline().parameters.RunningTask_LogID),0,pipeline().parameters.RunningTask_LogID),
        ',',
        '0,',
        '''Error occur on creation of the Account ', pipeline().parameters.M3AccountNumber,
        ' has not been created in Infor. ErrorType: ',
        activity('Call CRS610MI_Copy').output.results[0].errorType,
         ', ErrorMessage: ',
         activity('Call CRS610MI_Copy').output.results[0].errorMessage,
         variables('varError'), '. Pipeline Run ID: ', pipeline().RunId,
        ''')')
